focus: Decision guidance validation — different contexts, same decision dimensions

tasks.instruction: Create a 12-second 1920x1080 calm wellness brand video for 'Serene Spaces'. Gentle transitions between intro (0-4s), testimonial (4-8s), closing (8-12s). Soft tones.
tasks.input_data: Warm ivory bg (#f5efe6), sage green accent (#7a9d7a), dark text (#2d2d2d). Font: Lora serif.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent selects CSS-based transitions (blur crossfade or light leak) matching the 'calm' mood, not shader transitions.
tasks.success_criteria: Transition type matches 'calm' mood from features.md table (CSS: blur crossfade, focus pull, light leak). Uses entrance animations. Final scene fades out. lint passes.

tasks.instruction: Create a 15-second 1920x1080 technical explainer for 'DataSync API'. Multiple diagram-style scenes. Target: iterate quickly (3+ revisions expected), then final render.
tasks.input_data: Light bg (#f8f9fa), dark blue accent (#1a56db), dark text (#1f2937). Font: system sans-serif.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent uses --quality draft for iteration and --quality high for final render. Appropriate template choice for technical/API content.
tasks.success_criteria: Two render stages: draft for iteration, high for final. Template choice appropriate for technical content. lint passes on both iterations.

tasks.instruction: Create a 10-second 1080x1920 vertical overlay video for livestreaming in OBS. It will be composited over a game feed, so needs a transparent background. Animated lower-third style content with player name and stats.
tasks.input_data: No background (transparent). Bright text colors on gameplay. Player: 'Phoenix', K/D: 2.4, Win rate: 68%.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent selects webm format (transparency support) and designs for overlay use (no background, compositable layout).
tasks.success_criteria: --format webm used (required for transparency). No solid background color. Composition designed for overlay (positioned, not full-frame). lint passes.
